ui.errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
ui.errorBoundary.description: Try refreshing the page. If the issue continues, contact support with the request id from the API response.
ui.runtime.authRequired.title: Authentication required
ui.runtime.authRequired.description: Sign in again to continue. Your current route is preserved.
ui.runtime.offline.title: You are offline
ui.runtime.offline.description: Reconnect to continue. This screen stays on the current route and retries safely.
ui.runtime.serverUnavailable.title: Service temporarily unavailable
ui.runtime.serverUnavailable.description: The API is not responding right now. You can retry without leaving this page.
ui.runtime.notifications.label: API notifications
